creator: gabor@kovesdan.org
text:
Marcin,
thanks for uploading the patch, this time I could apply it without 
problems, but unfortunately the patches in the files directory are not 
correct, they does not apply cleanly:
http://people.freebsd.org/~gabor/logs/wackamole-2.1.4.log

Could you please take a look? But apart from this, I think we don't 
really need to eliminate configure warnings if they don't do any real 
harm. Maybe it is not worth the efforts and we can just check the first 
version of the patch from Felippe. Please tell me your opinion.

Regards,
Gabor Kovesdan
